hero.title: Track who cites an author or paper
hero.description: Search by author name or DOI/paper URL, then inspect publications, citing authors, institutions, and academic-prestige label summaries in one page.

author.label: Author
author.title: Find an author profile
author.description: Search ambiguous names, choose the right scholar, and inspect publications and citation network.

paper.label: Paper
paper.title: Inspect a paper's citations
paper.description: Resolve a DOI or URL, then see who cites the paper and where those citations come from.

search.authorHint: Author search returns candidate profiles first. Click a candidate to load details.
search.paperHint: Paper mode resolves DOI or paper URL, then aggregates citing authors and institutions.

candidates.title: Candidate Authors
candidates.subtitle: Pick the correct person before loading the citation view.

authorProfileStats.title: Author Profile Totals
authorProfileStats.subtitle: Author-level totals from the resolved profile.

publicationStats.title: Loaded Publication Sample
publicationStats.subtitle: Counts for the publications currently loaded for this author.

authorCitationStats.title: Loaded Citation Network Sample
authorCitationStats.subtitle: Counts from this run's citation crawl over a subset of seed publications, not the author's full citation graph.

citationBuildInfo.title: How This Citation Network Was Built

citationStats.title: Citation Statistics
citationStats.subtitle: Citation-side aggregates for the current paper.

honors.title: Academic Prestige Labels
honors.subtitle: Best-effort labels such as fellows, academy memberships, major awards, and comparable academic distinctions.

publications.title: Publication List
publications.subtitle: Recent or representative works for the selected author.

citationContext.summaryTitle: How This Paper Cites the Target

institutions.title: Citing Institutions
institutions.subtitle: Organizations appearing in the citation network.

authors.title: Citing Authors
authors.subtitle: People appearing in the citation network.

notableCiters.title: Notable Citers
notableCiters.subtitle: Highlighted citing authors with fellow, academy, award, or comparable prestige labels.

states.searchingAuthorsSubtitle: Matching ambiguous scholar names from OpenAlex and DBLP. This can take a moment.
states.loadingPinned: Jumping to the detail area and loading the citation view. Well-known scholars can take longer.
states.loadingAuthorSubtitle: Aggregating publications, citing authors, institutions, and summary statistics. Well-known scholars can take noticeably longer.
states.loadingPaperSubtitle: Resolving the DOI or link, then aggregating citing authors, institutions, and summary statistics.
states.dblpCandidate: DBLP candidate, detailed stats load after selection
states.noCitationContexts: No explicit citation sentence or paragraph was found in the fetched HTML full text.
states.emptyPaper: Enter a DOI or paper URL to inspect the citation graph.

stats.loadedCitingWorks: Citing works found in this run
stats.loadedCitingAuthors: Citing authors found in this run
stats.loadedCitingInstitutions: Citing institutions found in this run

buildInfo.seedPublications: This run selected {{count}} seed publications from the author's global publication list.
buildInfo.citingWorksPerSeed: Each seed publication fetched up to {{count}} citing works.
buildInfo.builtFromPage: The current citation network was built when author detail was loaded from publication page {{page}}, with page size {{pageSize}}.

errors.paperQueryRequired: Enter a DOI or paper URL first.
errors.quotaUserExhausted: Insufficient points. Please get a redeem code from the purchase page, then redeem it in Account.
